title: Tatabánya, Komárom-Esztergom — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tatabánya, Komárom-Esztergom: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tatabánya is a city in Komárom-Esztergom with a population of 65,845. A modern industrial city in northwestern Hungary, known for its mining heritage, the Turul Monument, and the nearby Gerecse Mountains.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
